source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.9 (1,1,1,9)
distilled_thesis: All-too-great happiness is the overwhelming object beheld by the tranquil eye without envy.
